title: Add Remember Me feature to login with persistent session

requirements.text: Add a 'Remember Me' checkbox to the login/authentication UI. When the user initiates the Internet Identity login flow, display a clearly labeled 'Remember Me' checkbox before or alongside the login button. Persist the user's 'Remember Me' preference in localStorage.

quotes: When the user starts logging in make button that says remember me

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Remember Me' checkbox is visible on the login screen/AuthGate login prompt
Checking 'Remember Me' saves the preference to localStorage (e.g., key: 'rememberMe')
The checkbox state persists across page refreshes

requirements.text: When 'Remember Me' is enabled and the user is logged in, prevent the user from being automatically or accidentally signed out. The logout/sign-out action should be suppressed or require explicit confirmation when 'Remember Me' is active. Specifically: (1) If 'Remember Me' is stored as true in localStorage, the app should restore/maintain the authenticated session on page load without re-prompting login. (2) The sign-out button should either be hidden or show a confirmation dialog ('Are you sure you want to sign out? Remember Me is enabled.') before proceeding with logout when the preference is active.

quotes: everytime when they sign out make sure the user doesn't get signed out when the user is signed in

acceptanceCriteria: When 'Remember Me' is enabled, the user remains signed in after closing and reopening the browser tab
When 'Remember Me' is enabled, clicking the sign-out button shows a confirmation dialog before signing out
The confirmation dialog clearly warns the user that 'Remember Me' is enabled
If the user confirms sign-out, they are logged out and the 'Remember Me' preference is cleared from localStorage
If the user cancels the confirmation, they remain signed in
When 'Remember Me' is not enabled, sign-out behaves as normal without a confirmation dialog

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts directly — implement Remember Me logic in a wrapper or via the components that call these hooks
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Backend session storage — Remember Me state should be handled entirely in localStorage on the frontend
Changing the Internet Identity authentication provider or flow
Automatic session renewal or token refresh logic beyond what Internet Identity provides
